kill_fact: Could NOT kill it. Every load-bearing fact independently confirmed against primary sources: the FDA accepted the BBP-418 (LGMD2I/R9) NDA with Priority Review and set a HARD, BINDING PDUFA target action date of November 27, 2026 (announced May 27, 2026), and explicitly stated it is NOT currently planning an advisory committee meeting (BridgeBio IR/GlobeNewswire release + SEC 8-K). The catalyst is genuinely LIVE, DATED, and UN-FIRED (~150 days out as of the 2026-06-29 run; the spread has not resolved). Phase 3 FORTIFY met all primary and secondary endpoints at the 12-month interim (verified: glycosylated alphaDG +1.8x p<0.0001, 82% CK reduction p<0.0001, motor/pulmonary gains). The downside floor does NOT break: this is NOT a single-asset binary with going-concern risk -- there is a real, already-commercial franchise (Attruby U.S. net product revenue $180.6M in Q1 2026, +392% YoY) plus $940.2M cash/marketable securities as of 3/31/2026 and a $500M buyback authorization, all independently confirmed. A CRL/CMC rejection is a real but BOUNDED tail (trims one driver), not a wipeout.
corrections: (1) CONVERTIBLE DEBT / MATURITY WALL MISSTATED. The candidate's valley_of_death claims 'no near-term maturity wall' and frames the converts as ~$632M of 2033 notes. Coverage (Mizuho, which cut its PT $106->$96 specifically on this) flags ~$550M of convertible notes due 2027 -- a genuine near-term maturity/refi overhang the bull understated. It does NOT break the floor ($940M cash more than covers it) but the 'no maturity wall' line is wrong and should read: a 2027 convertible maturity exists as a financing overhang, fully covered by current cash. (2) UPSIDE LEG IS RICH. The ~55-60% approval prob and $105 win-case are the model's own inference, not verified facts; the verified Street cluster is $84-$96 (Mizuho now $96, BELOW the $105 high-case), so the headline +57% upside should be marked closer to the Street ceiling. (3) Prior skeptic pass logged conviction_cap on a 0-5 scale (=5); this pass uses the required 0-100 scale.
evidence: BridgeBio IR / GlobeNewswire, 2026-05-27: 'BridgeBio Announces FDA Acceptance and Priority Review of NDA for BBP-418 for LGMD2I/R9' -- PDUFA target action date November 27, 2026; FDA 'is not currently planning to hold an advisory committee meeting'. https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/05/27/3301817/0/en/bridgebio-announces-fda-acceptance-and-priority-review-of-nda-for-bbp-418-for-lgmd2i-r9.html

BridgeBio IR / GlobeNewswire, 2025-10-27: 'BridgeBio Reports Positive Phase 3 Results for Small Molecule BBP-418 in LGMD2I/R9 FORTIFY Study' -- met all primary + secondary endpoints (glycosylated alphaDG +1.8x p<0.0001, 82% CK reduction p<0.0001), favorable safety. https://investor.bridgebio.com/news/news-details/2025/BridgeBio-Reports-Positive-Phase-3-Results-for-Small-Molecule-BBP-418-in-LGMD2IR9-FORTIFY-Study/default.aspx

BridgeBio Q1 2026 results + SEC 8-K (filed 2026-05-07; sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/0001743881/000174388126000018): Q1 2026 total revenue $194.5M, Attruby U.S. net product revenue $180.6M (+392% YoY), cash/marketable securities $940.2M as of 3/31/2026, $500M repurchase authorization -- confirms the franchise-and-cash floor.

Mizuho note (June 2026, via Investing.com): PT cut $106->$96 citing the ~$550M convertible notes due 2027 -- primary corroboration of the 2027 maturity overhang and a Street ceiling (~$96) below the $105 win-case.
